rationale: Keep: the citing paper’s core design includes a joint demand–pricing system with price endogeneity correction, and the cited paper is specifically a joint random-coefficients logit demand plus retailer pricing model with endogeneity treatment, indicating strong methodological overlap. The cited study also focuses on retailer pricing behavior at aggregate chain/category level, which is directly aligned with constructs in the citing paper’s pricing component. With this substantive alignment (and an exact DOI match), this is not a clearly incidental mention.
